message:
Update check.nix to use test-legacy directory

The previous commit updated package.nix but missed check.nix,
which still referenced the old test/ directory paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,12 +27,12 @@ stdenvNoCC.mkDerivation {
         ps.trustme
       ]);
       template = path: ''
-        if [ -d "${path}/test/tests" ]; then
+        if [ -d "${path}/test-legacy/tests" ]; then
           echo "running ${path} integration tests"
           tenzir-test \
-            --root "${src}/test" \
+            --root "${src}/test-legacy" \
             -j $NIX_BUILD_CORES \
-            ${path}/test
+            ${path}/test-legacy
         fi
       '';
     in
